---
title: "simpleicons Example (HTML)"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
---

## Basic usage

{{< si github >}}
{{< si python >}}
{{< si javascript >}}

## Custom size

{{< si rust size=3em >}}
{{< si typescript size=48px >}}

## Custom color

{{< si github color=#181717 >}}
{{< si python color=#3776AB >}}
{{< si javascript color=#F7DF1E >}}

## Brand colors with size

{{< si docker size=2em color=#2496ED >}}
{{< si kubernetes size=2em color=#326CE5 >}}
{{< si linux size=2em color=#FCC624 >}}

## Accessible label

{{< si github size=2em label="GitHub" >}}
{{< si slack size=2em label="Slack" >}}

## Extra CSS class

{{< si neovim size=2em class="my-icon" >}}
